FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.27sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f2fa1467880>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-04-30T02:05:07Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-04-30T02:03:27Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _

test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert test_username in usernames, (
            f"Test user {test_username!r} not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )

E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/04/30 02:06:44.914988460 {

2026/04/30 02:06:44.915070493 if (!missing(paper))
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915088387 new$paper <- paper
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915089349 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915102774 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915103475 if (!missing(bg))

2026/04/30 02:06:44.915113514 if (!missing(fg))

2026/04/30 02:06:44.915122240 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915130976 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915131468 if (!missing(pagecentre))

2026/04/30 02:06:44.915241974 new$compress <- compress
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915242495 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915254568 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915255009 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {

2026/04/30 02:06:44.915278443 "default"))
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915289263 old$encoding <- enc
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915289684 family <- family$metrics
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915299091 }

2026/04/30 02:06:44.915334157 if (length(family) == 4L) {

2026/04/30 02:06:44.915351880 }

2026/04/30 02:06:44.915364754 }
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915365265 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915374011 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]

2026/04/30 02:06:44.915395522 }

2026/04/30 02:06:44.914875889 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/04/30 02:06:44.914925632 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/04/30 02:06:44.914988460 {
2026/04/30 02:06:44.914989462 initPSandPDFfonts()
2026/04/30 02:06:44.914998508 new <- list()

2026/04/30 02:06:44.915008227 if (!missing(height))

2026/04/30 02:06:44.915026781 new$onefile <- onefile

2026/04/30 02:06:44.915069381 new$version <- version
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915070493 if (!missing(paper))
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915088387 new$paper <- paper
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915089349 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915102774 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915103475 if (!missing(bg))
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915113103 new$bg <- bg
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915113514 if (!missing(fg))
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915121819 new$fg <- fg
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915122240 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915130976 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915131468 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915141206 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915141667 if (!missing(colormodel))

2026/04/30 02:06:44.915158889 if (!missing(useDingbats))

2026/04/30 02:06:44.915185389 if (!missing(useKerning))

2026/04/30 02:06:44.915226816 if (!missing(compress))
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915241974 new$compress <- compress
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915242495 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915254568 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915255009 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915266621 enc <- family$encoding
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915267071 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915277972 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915278443 "default"))
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915289263 old$encoding <- enc
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915289684 family <- family$metrics
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915299091 }
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915299582 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915315843 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915316915 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915334157 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915335018 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915351880 }
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915352712 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915364754 }
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915365265 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915374011 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915374503 if (is.null(pf))
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915384161 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915384671 domain = NA)
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915395101 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915395522 }
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915404268 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915404689 old$family <- family
2026/04/30 02:06:44.915415038 }
